title: Backend skeleton: /api/chat streaming endpoint
userStory: As Steve, I want a streaming chat endpoint so that the PWA can talk to Claude with tools.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/routes/api/chat/+server.ts accepts POST { messages: AnthropicMessage[] }
System prompt held in pwa/src/lib/server/system-prompt.ts (writing-partner persona, voice rules summary, brain integration instructions)
Endpoint calls anthropic.messages.stream({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', tools: [...], messages }) and streams via SSE
Verify: curl -X POST localhost:5173/api/chat -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}' streams a response
